task_completion.description: Verify that the reporter fields were corrected to 'U.S.' for the cases with incorrect reporters.
task_completion.visual_evidence: In the right-hand Info pane of Juris-M, the 'Reporter' field for 'Mapp v. Ohio', 'United States v. Leon', and 'Weeks v. United States' should be changed from F.2d/F.3d to 'U.S.'.

task_completion.description: Verify that the court fields were corrected to the Supreme Court for the cases with incorrect district court designations.
task_completion.visual_evidence: In the right-hand Info pane, the 'Court' field for 'Illinois v. Gates' and 'Bivens v. Six Unknown Named Agents' should indicate the United States Supreme Court instead of a district court (e.g., USDC N.D. Ill.).

task_completion.description: Verify that the year was corrected for United States v. Cortez.
task_completion.visual_evidence: In the right-hand Info pane, the 'Date' or 'Year' field for 'United States v. Cortez' should be changed from 2001 to 1981.

task_completion.description: Verify that the placeholder page numbers were replaced with the correct first page numbers.
task_completion.visual_evidence: In the right-hand Info pane, the 'Pages' or 'First Page' field should be changed from '999' to '1' for 'Terry v. Ohio', and to '347' for 'Katz v. United States'.

task_completion.description: Verify that the cases were tagged with 'audited'.
task_completion.visual_evidence: The tag 'audited' should be visible in the tags pane (bottom left) or in the 'Tags' tab of the right-hand pane for the edited cases. A colored square might appear next to the items in the middle pane if a color was assigned to the tag.

task_completion.description: Verify that a new collection named 'Audited Cases' was created and contains the cases.
task_completion.visual_evidence: A folder/collection named 'Audited Cases' should be visible in the left-hand pane. When this collection is selected, the middle pane should list the 10 Supreme Court cases.

integrity.description: Verifies that the agent used the Juris-M graphical interface to edit the records.
integrity.visual_evidence: Screenshots should show the Juris-M window open with the agent clicking and typing in the Info pane, rather than using terminal commands to modify the database.

integrity.description: Verifies the agent actually typed the corrections manually in the UI.
integrity.visual_evidence: Screenshots should capture intermediate states of typing 'U.S.', '1981', '1', '347', or 'audited' in the respective Juris-M fields.

integrity.description: Verifies the agent did not use scripts to bypass the UI.
integrity.visual_evidence: There should be no terminal windows showing sqlite3 commands or python scripts interacting directly with the zotero.sqlite or jurism.sqlite file.

privileged_info_for_vlm:
Verified facts for the VLM verifier:
1. Reporter corrections: 'Mapp v. Ohio', 'United States v. Leon', and 'Weeks v. United States' must be changed to 'U.S.'.
2. Court corrections: 'Illinois v. Gates' and 'Bivens v. Six Unknown Named Agents' must be changed to 'United States Supreme Court'.
3. Year correction: 'United States v. Cortez' must be changed to 1981.
4. Page corrections: 'Terry v. Ohio' must be changed to page 1. 'Katz v. United States' must be changed to page 347.
5. Tagging: All 10 cases must have the tag 'audited'.
6. Collection: A new collection named 'Audited Cases' must be created and contain all 10 cases.
